feedItems.description: allocated £3.8m to Environment & Streets (≈£33 per resident)
allocated £2.3m to Culture & Leisure (≈£20 per resident)
allocated £3.4m to Council Running Costs (≈£30 per resident)
allocated £1.8m to Planning & Development (≈£15 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £115 (4.8%) to £2516
